name: Use of Wrong Operator in String Comparison
description: The product uses the wrong operator for string comparison, such as using == instead of .equals() in Java. This compares object references rather than string values, leading to incorrect comparison results that can affect security-critical logic.
detection_pattern: CONTROL(string_comparison) node uses identity operator (==) on string objects arriving from INGRESS or TRANSFORM nodes. The CONTROL branch depends on string equality but lacks proper TRANSFORM(string_equals) invocation, causing incorrect branching on logically equal strings.
